chapter_title: Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol
text: It is unlawful to violate any regulation adopted by the commissioner pursuant to this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2.5. Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol [2500 - 2574]
#### Article 1. General Provisions [2500 - 2505]
##### § 2504

It is unlawful to violate any regulation adopted by the commissioner pursuant to this chapter.

*(Amended by Stats. 1970, Ch. 1067.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful to violate any regulation adopted by the commissioner pursuant to this chapter.
